[HIGH] database: Destructive migration: Rails drop_table
  Message: Rails drop_table detected at db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb:3
  File: db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb:3
  Detail: danger-term: rails.drop-table
  Recommendation: Run the migration locally before deploying. Confirm a rollback path exists. Consider splitting destructive operations into a forward-only deploy + a separate cleanup migration.

[HIGH] database: New migration has destructive operation without down() method
  Message: New migration db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb contains a destructive operation but has no down() method for rollback
  File: db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb
  Detail: missing-down
  Recommendation: Add a down() method to enable rollback of this migration. If the destructive operation is intentional and irreversible, document the no-rollback decision in the migration body and confirm with the team before deploying.

[HIGH] database: Database/migration path changed
  Message: File 'db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb' matches path-classifier rule 'rails.migrations' for category 'database'.
  File: db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb
  Detail: rails.migrations
  Recommendation: Database/migration changes can be destructive and hard to roll back. Run the migration locally, confirm a rollback path exists, and consider splitting destructive operations into a forward-only deploy plus a separate cleanup migration.

[HIGH] test-gap: Risky change without paired test: rails.migrations
  Message: Changes to db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb were not paired with a sibling test change in the same diff
  File: db/migrate/20260101000000_drop_old_table.rb
  Detail: path-rule: rails.migrations
  Recommendation: Add or update sibling tests for this change in the same diff. Risky-area changes without paired test changes are difficult to verify and easy to regress. If the change is intentionally test-exempt (e.g., a pure config tweak), document the exemption in the change description.
